name: asciidoc-antora-reference
description: A la carte reference site demonstrating every AsciiDoc + Antora feature, live-rendered.

scripts.watch: trap 'kill 0' INT TERM EXIT; onchange 'docs/**/*' 'supplemental-ui/**/*' 'antora-playbook.yml' -- npm run build & browser-sync start --server public --startPath reference/index.html --files 'public/_/css/*.css, public/**/*.html' --no-notify; wait
